roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATIONS #1-#4 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:90 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #5 - ABSCONDING FOR LACK OFEVIDENCE,/X:CLIENT WILL BE GRANTED A COURT  OR  AND WILL BE ALLOWED TO SERVE THE REMAINDER OF HIS SENTENCE AT THE PHATT CHANCE CLEAN AND SOBER LIVING PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL PARTICIPATION AT THE PHATT CHANCE CLEAN AND SOBER LIVING PROGRAM,/X:COURT ORDERS THE CLIENT RELEASED TODAY ON A COURT  OR, ,/X:THE REMAINDER OF THE SENTENCE SHALL BE STAYED,/ /X:UPON HIS RELEASE, HE MUST REPORT TO AGENT STEPHEN VELEZ TO GET ON HISMONITOR,ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT,IF CLIENT FAILSTO COMPLETE THE 90 DAYS OF PARTICIPATION AT THE PHATT CHANCE PROGRAM, HE WILL BE REMANDED TO SERVE THE REMAINDER OF HIS SENTENCE IN-CUSTODY,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 8-21-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIMELOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
